requirements.title: EVA Brain v2 runnable and tested API
requirements.notes: Sprint 0 completed Feb 19, 2026. Uvicorn starts, all routers mounted, OpenAI + Search connected.

requirements.title: EVA Faces shared design system
requirements.notes: Phase 1 COMPLETE. Shared component library published. Storybook scaffold in place.

requirements.title: Admin screens and backend integration
requirements.notes: eva-faces Phase 2. Mar 1-17, 2026. SettingsPage and AppsPage still use MockBackendService.

requirements.title: Chat UI and agent framework integration
requirements.notes: eva-faces Phase 3. Full ChatPane wired to /v1/sessions + /v1/messages endpoints.

requirements.title: Testing and Azure SWA deployment
requirements.notes: eva-faces Phase 4. Mar 25-31, 2026. Playwright E2E, WCAG report, SWA deploy, APIM import.

requirements.title: Fix router prefix for sessions, search, config, ingest, admin
requirements.notes: Routers missing /v1 prefix. Affects all auto-generated endpoint ids in model.

requirements.title: Mount tags.py router in main.py
requirements.notes: tags.py exists and defines route but is not included in app startup.

requirements.title: Add support persona to action.chat feature flag
requirements.notes: feature_flags.json action.chat only lists lawyer/paralegal — support persona missing.

requirements.title: Granular feature flag IDs for search and ingest groups
requirements.notes: Current flags are action.search/action.ingest — need per-operation flags (e.g. action.search.semantic).

requirements.title: Wire SettingsPage and AppsPage to real endpoints
requirements.notes: MockBackendService has 82 inline keys. Config and apps endpoints are present in brain-api.

requirements.title: Build AuditLogsPage and RbacPage implementations
requirements.notes: Screens scaffolded, real data wiring not started.

requirements.title: Import EVA Brain API into marco-sandbox-apim
requirements.notes: Scheduled Mar 29-30, 2026. OpenAPI spec needs to be finalised first.

requirements.title: Configure Key Vault secrets for all services
requirements.notes: Scheduled Mar 31 - Apr 4, 2026. Includes openai-api-key, search-api-key, cosmos-key, storage-key, appinsights, client-secret.

requirements.title: Scaffold Playwright E2E tests for admin and chat faces
requirements.notes: Playwright config present in eva-faces. E2E test cases to cover TranslationsPage CRUD, ChatPane send.

requirements.title: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance audit and remediation
requirements.notes: Accessibility report required before SWA deployment. axe-core integration planned.

requirements.title: As an admin I can create and delete translations
As an admin I can view ingestion job status
As a user I can chat with EVA using my persona
As an admin I can assign roles to users
Brain API returns 200 on GET /health when all services reachable
TranslationsPage shows error toast when POST /translations returns 4xx
ChatPane disables send while awaiting streamed response
